summary: Iteration 65 - USSD Simulator Component Testing. All frontend features verified: Super Admin USSD tab with simulator and Guide des flux (5 flow cards), Cooperative dashboard USSD simulator toggle with instructions panel, Farmer registration page with all form fields, Cooperative inscriptions page with stats and table. USSD Simulator functionality tested: start session, quick action buttons, option 1 (existing farmer main menu), option 2 (registration step 1), session end with 'Nouvelle session' button. Orange Money and SMS are MOCKED.

minor.issue: AxiosError on Super Admin Analytics page - non-blocking, page still loads

critical_code_review_comments: USSDSimulator component at /app/frontend/src/components/USSDSimulator.jsx is reusable with props: title, onClose
Super Admin USSD tab shows simulator on left, Guide des flux on right with 5 flow cards (Inscription, Estimation Simple, Estimation Detaillee, Demande Versement, Mon Profil)
Cooperative dashboard has 'Simulateur USSD' button in Quick Actions with data-testid='quick-action-ussd-simulator'
Cooperative simulator panel shows instructions: 4 steps for using the simulator
USSD Simulator uses session-based API calls to /api/ussd/callback
Quick action buttons are extracted from last system message by regex matching lines like '1. Option text'
Farmer registration page at /farmer/inscription has all form fields with data-testid attributes
Cooperative inscriptions page at /cooperative/inscriptions shows stats (Total, Via USSD, Via Web) and table with Canal badges
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data from iteration 64
context_for_next_testing_agent: USSD Simulator component is fully functional. Super Admin accesses it via USSD tab in /admin/analytics. Cooperative accesses it via 'Simulateur USSD' button in /cooperative/dashboard Quick Actions. The simulator uses session-based state machine with /api/ussd/callback. Quick buttons appear based on menu options in last system message. Session end shows 'Nouvelle session' button. Orange Money and SMS are MOCKED.

mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed

super_admin_ussd_tab.ussd_tab_visible: PASS - Tab with value='ussd' visible in tabs list
super_admin_ussd_tab.ussd_tab_clickable: PASS - Clicking tab shows USSD content
super_admin_ussd_tab.flow_cards: PASS - 5 cards: Inscription, Estimation Simple, Estimation Detaillee, Demande Versement, Mon Profil

ussd_simulator_functionality.start_session: PASS - Clicking start button sends request to /api/ussd/callback and displays welcome menu
ussd_simulator_functionality.welcome_menu: PASS - Shows 4 options: 1. Je suis deja inscrit, 2. Nouvelle inscription, 3. Aide / Infos, 0. Quitter
ussd_simulator_functionality.quick_action_buttons: PASS - Buttons appear matching menu options (1, 2, 3, 0)
ussd_simulator_functionality.option_1_existing_farmer: PASS - With phone +2250799999999, shows main menu with farmer name 'Public Test'
ussd_simulator_functionality.option_2_registration: PASS - Shows registration step 1: 'Etape 1/4 Entrez votre nom et prenom'
ussd_simulator_functionality.session_end: PASS - Typing 0 ends session with 'Merci d'avoir utilise GreenLink. A bientot !'
ussd_simulator_functionality.nouvelle_session_button: PASS - data-testid='ussd-sim-restart-btn' appears when session ends

cooperative_dashboard_simulator.simulator_button: PASS - data-testid='quick-action-ussd-simulator' visible in Quick Actions
cooperative_dashboard_simulator.simulator_toggle: PASS - Clicking button shows simulator panel
cooperative_dashboard_simulator.instructions_panel: PASS - 'Comment utiliser le simulateur' section with 4 steps

cooperative_inscriptions_page.page_subtitle: PASS - 'Inscriptions via USSD et formulaire web'
cooperative_inscriptions_page.inscriptions-table: PASS - Shows 8 rows with Canal badges (USSD blue, Web purple)
